text: - **Filed [NMP #2870](https://github.com/pablof7z/nostr-multi-platform/issues/2870)** with all 6 findings, each with verdict, file:line, failure scenario, and suggested fix — plus a "verified non-issues" section (serde compat, deleted-trait consumers, ownership collisions, the nostr pin, mechanical gates) so nobody re-litigates what the review already cleared.
